final_prompt.prompt:
Create a concept art illustration of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "赛博朋克" (cyberpunk) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include towering skyscrapers, flying cars weaving through them
Scene/backdrop: must include a futuristic cityscape at night with neon lights, acid rain falling from the sky, puddles on the ground reflecting lights
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech yet decadent atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be blue-purple dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a wet, reflective surface treatment — exact sheen level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
